2026-05-31T10:02:42.9095891Z ##[group]Run # Create a temporary file
2026-05-31T10:02:42.9096353Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:42.9096639Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:42.9096888Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:42.9097140Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:42.9097745Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:42.9098079Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:42.9098300Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.0515172Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1930994Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1931334Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1931766Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1932054Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1932356Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1932680Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1933014Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1933410Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1933781Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1934120Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1934375Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1934594Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1935057Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1935505Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1935704Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1936038Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1936568Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1937016Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1937211Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1937907Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1938553Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1938758Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T10:02:43.1939087Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
